summary: real-spawn 데모: design(ditto:planner)→implement(ditto:implementer)→verify(ditto:verifier) 전부 실제 spawn된 subagent가 수행, 오케스트레이터는 select/spawn/judge/record만. complete 자신이 새 기능으로 non-terminal 노드를 surfacing(이 그래프는 done이라 해당 risk 없음).

evidence.summary: seam: assembleCompletionFromGraph L60-78
remaining_risks already exists L74 (no schema change)
planner subgraph implement→verify == seed N2/N3; orchestrator declines promotion to avoid duplicate lifecycle nodes
non-terminal nodes → remaining_risks (caller risks preserved, pass-only-none-on-terminal)
3 new tests: ac-1 surface+name ids / caller-risk preserved / ac-2 all-terminal none
785 pass / 0 fail (independently re-run by orchestrator)
11 pass / 0 fail, exit 0 (ac-1, ac-2 non-vacuous)
785 pass / 0 fail, exit 0 (ac-3)
non-terminal surfacing L72-78 verified against impl
